title: Campus Smart Energy Dashboard
summary: A real-time dashboard that visualizes lab and classroom energy usage to encourage sustainable habits.

title: AI Study Buddy
summary: A chatbot that helps first-year students with course planning, lab guidance, and campus resources.

title: Disaster Response Drone Mapping
summary: A lightweight mapping workflow using drones to assist local responders with rapid situational awareness.

title: Women in Tech Mentorship Portal
summary: A matching portal connecting mentors and mentees with structured learning tracks and events.
